languages.text: "Это ловушка! Мы все застряли во временной петле, понимаете?"

traits.locale_text: "Это ловушка! Мы все застряли во временной петле, понимаете?"

languages.text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"
languages.original_text: "Это ловушка! Мы все застряли во временной петле, понимаете?"

traits.locale_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"
"It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"
"It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

languages.text: “这是个陷阱！我们都被困在时间循环里了，你们难道看不出来吗？”
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: “这是个陷阱！我们都被困在时间循环里了，你们难道看不出来吗？”

languages.text: « C'est un piège ! Vous ne voyez donc pas que nous sommes tous prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle ? »
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est un piège ! Vous ne voyez donc pas que nous sommes tous prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle ? »

languages.text: "Bu bir tuzak! Hepimiz bir zaman döngüsündeyiz, görmüyor musunuz?"
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu bir tuzak! Hepimiz bir zaman döngüsündeyiz, görmüyor musunuz?"

languages.text: «¡Es una trampa! Estamos todos atrapados en un bucle temporal, ¿es que no lo ve?».
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Es una trampa! Estamos todos atrapados en un bucle temporal, ¿es que no lo ve?».

languages.text: "Das ist eine Falle! Wir sind alle in einer Zeitschleife gefangen, erkennt Ihr das nicht?"
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist eine Falle! Wir sind alle in einer Zeitschleife gefangen, erkennt Ihr das nicht?"

languages.text: 「これは罠だ！私たちは全員時間ループに捕らわれている、気づかないのか？」
languages.original_text: "It's a trap! We're all caught in a time loop, don't you see?"

traits.locale_text: 「これは罠だ！私たちは全員時間ループに捕らわれている、気づかないのか？」
